name: content-workspace
title: Agent-Native Content Workspace
description: Agent-Native Content Agent-Native template ported into Studio UI as a Harness-safe workspace surface with route inventory, provenance, resident-renderer blocks, and display-only agent/action affordances.

files.content:
{
  "$schema": "https://jami.studio/schemas/registry/workspace-manifest.generated.json",
  "name": "@jami-studio/content-workspace",
  "workspace": "content",
  "schemaVersion": "2026-06-29.agent-native-template-workspace",
  "items": [
    "jami-theme",
    "panel",
    "button",
    "media-grid",
    "content-app",
    "content-detail-page",
    "content-home-page",
    "content-extensions-detail-detail-page",
    "content-extensions-detail-page",
    "content-extensions-index-page",
    "content-extensions-page",
    "content-local-files-page",
    "content-page-detail-page",
    "content-page-index-page",
    "content-page-page",
    "content-settings-page",
    "content-team-page",
    "content-home-2-page",
    "content-p-detail-page",
    "content-detail-block",
    "content-home-block",
    "content-extensions-detail-detail-block",
    "content-extensions-detail-block",
    "content-extensions-index-block",
    "content-extensions-block",
    "content-local-files-block",
    "content-page-detail-block",
    "content-page-index-block",
    "content-page-block",
    "content-settings-block",
    "content-team-block",
    "content-home-2-block",
    "content-p-detail-block"
  ],
  "installGraph": {
    "root": "content-workspace",
    "dependencies": [
      "jami-theme",
      "panel",
      "button",
      "media-grid",
      "content-app",
      "content-detail-page",
      "content-home-page",
      "content-extensions-detail-detail-page",
      "content-extensions-detail-page",
      "content-extensions-index-page",
      "content-extensions-page",
      "content-local-files-page",
      "content-page-detail-page",
      "content-page-index-page",
      "content-page-page",
      "content-settings-page",
      "content-team-page",
      "content-home-2-page",
      "content-p-detail-page",
      "content-detail-block",
      "content-home-block",
      "content-extensions-detail-detail-block",
      "content-extensions-detail-block",
      "content-extensions-index-block",
      "content-extensions-block",
      "content-local-files-block",
      "content-page-detail-block",
      "content-page-index-block",
      "content-page-block",
      "content-settings-block",
      "content-team-block",
      "content-home-2-block",
      "content-p-detail-block"
    ]
  },
  "plannedSurfaces": [
    ":id",
    "content",
    "extensions",
    "extensions",
    "extensions",
    "extensions",
    "local-files",
    "page",
    "page",
    "page",
    "settings",
    "team",
    "content",
    "p"
  ],
  "shell": {
    "sourceSchemaVersion": "2026-06-29.agent-native-template-workspace",
    "title": "Agent-Native Content",
    "summary": "Agent-Native Content Agent-Native template ported into Studio UI as a Harness-safe workspace surface with route inventory, provenance, resident-renderer blocks, and display-only agent/action affordances.",
    "appShell": {
      "id": "app.content.shell",
      "layout": "agent-native-template-workspace",
      "navigation": [
        {
          "label": "Detail",
          "route": "/content/:id"
        },
        {
          "label": "Home",
          "route": "/content"
        },
        {
          "label": "Extensions Detail Detail",
          "route": "/content/extensions/:id/:slug"
        },
        {
          "label": "Extensions Detail",
          "route": "/content/extensions/:id"
        },
        {
          "label": "Extensions Index",
          "route": "/content/extensions"
        },
        {
          "label": "Extensions",
          "route": "/content/extensions"
        },
        {
          "label": "Local Files",
          "route": "/content/local-files"
        },
        {
          "label": "Page Detail",
          "route": "/content/page/:id"
        }
      ]
    },
    "routes": [
      {
        "path": "/content/:id",
        "page": "page.content.detail",
        "title": "Detail",
        "blocks": [
          "block.content.detail"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/content/app/routes/$id.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/content",
        "page": "page.content.home",
        "title": "Content Home",
        "blocks": [
          "block.content.home"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/content/app/routes/_app._index.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/content/extensions/:id/:slug",
        "page": "page.content.extensions-detail-detail",
        "title": "Extensions Detail Detail",
        "blocks": [
          "block.content.extensions-detail-detail"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/content/app/routes/_app.extensions.$id.$slug.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/content/extensions/:id",
        "page": "page.content.extensions-detail",
        "title": "Extensions Detail",
        "blocks": [
          "block.content.extensions-detail"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/content/app/routes/_app.extensions.$id.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/content/extensions",
        "page": "page.content.extensions-index",
        "title": "Extensions Index",
        "blocks": [
          "block.content.extensions-index"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/content/app/routes/_app.extensions._index.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/content/extensions",
        "page": "page.content.extensions",
        "title": "Extensions",
        "blocks": [
          "block.content.extensions"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/content/app/routes/_app.extensions.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/content/local-files",
        "page": "page.content.local-files",
        "title": "Local Files",
        "blocks": [
          "block.content.local-files"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/content/app/routes/_app.local-files.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/content/page/:id",
        "page": "page.content.page-detail",
        "title": "Page Detail",
        "blocks": [
          "block.content.page-detail"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/content/app/routes/_app.page.$id.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/content/page",
        "page": "page.content.page-index",
        "title": "Page Index",
        "blocks": [
          "block.content.page-index"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/content/app/routes/_app.page._index.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/content/page",
        "page": "page.content.page",
        "title": "Page",
        "blocks": [
          "block.content.page"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/content/app/routes/_app.page.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/content/settings",
        "page": "page.content.settings",
        "title": "Settings",
        "blocks": [
          "block.content.settings"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/content/app/routes/_app.settings.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/content/team",

        "title": "Team",
        "blocks": [
          "block.content.team"

        ],

    ],
    "pages": [
      {
        "id": "page.content.detail",
        "title": "Detail",
        "description": "Agent-Native content route /:id derived from $id.tsx.",
        "components": [
          "media-grid",
          "panel",

      },
      {
        "id": "page.content.extensions-detail",
        "title": "Extensions Detail",
        "description": "Agent-Native content route /extensions/:id derived from _app.extensions.$id.tsx.",
        "components": [
          "media-grid",

        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/content/app/routes/_app.extensions.$id.tsx"

      {

      },
      {

        "components": [

      {

    "blocks": [
      {
        "id": "block.content.detail",
        "title": "Detail",

      "copiedSource": false

lifecycle.migrationNotes: Agent-Native Agent-Native Content template imported from yrka-io/agent-native as a complete Studio UI workspace shell over all discovered route files; execution remains display-only behind Jami Harness contracts.

upstream.importedAs: jami-authored workspace shell and registry metadata derived from Agent-Native template structure

compatibility.shadcn: Studio UI registry metadata generated from Agent-Native template route inventory; source app remains upstream-owned until forked into Jami packages.
compatibility.tailwind: Consumes generated --jami-* CSS variables in the Studio UI workbench port.
